title: Europe Wanted a Say on the Iran War, but It’s Still on the Sidelines
summary_full: A British-French plan to secure the Strait of Hormuz would give the continent a role. But Tehran and Washington are still calling the shots.
summary_public: A British-French plan to secure the Strait of Hormuz would give the continent a role. But Tehran and Washington are still calling the shots.
